ddls:
CREATE TABLE "config_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration parameter (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration parameter */,
  "static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is static (true/false) */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is optional (true/false) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration parameter (e.g., Performance, Config & Admin) */,
  "param_min_value" TEXT /* Minimum valid value for the parameter */,
  "param_max_value" TEXT /* Maximum valid value for the parameter */,
  "param_regex" TEXT /* Regular expression for validating the parameter value */,
  "param_is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is sensitive (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Development, Testing, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the environment is active (true/false) */,
  "parent_env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent environment (for hierarchical environments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "env_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment configuration */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter for the specific environment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the configuration */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was deployed */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_env_configurations_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_env_configurations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES config_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_env_configurations_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit configurations (true/false) */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view configurations (true/false) */,
  "can_deploy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can deploy configurations (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration parameter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES config_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., JobQueueMaxWaitTime, JobQueueThreadPoolSize) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration template */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter in the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_templates_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES config_parameters ("param_id")
)
